ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "blood_type" TEXT /* Blood type of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Name of the insurance provider */,
  "insurance_id" TEXT /* Insurance ID of the patient */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the patient record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the patient record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "encounters" (
  "encounter_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each encounter */,
  "patient_id" TEXT /* ID of the patient associated with the encounter */,
  "encounter_type" TEXT /* Type of encounter (e.g., hospitalization, outpatient visit) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the encounter */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the encounter */,
  "facility_id" TEXT /* ID of the medical facility where the encounter occurred */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare provider who conducted the encounter */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the encounter */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the encounter record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the encounter record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("encounter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_encounters_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_encounters_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES healthcare_providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_encounters_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diagnoses" (
  "diagnosis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each diagnosis */,
  "encounter_id" TEXT /* ID of the encounter associated with the diagnosis */,
  "code" INTEGER /* Code for the diagnosis */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the diagnosis */,
  "icd_code" TEXT /* International Classification of Diseases (ICD) code */,
  "icd_version" TEXT /* Version of the ICD code */,
  "confirmed_date" TEXT /* Date when the diagnosis was confirmed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the diagnosis record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the diagnosis record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("diagnosis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diagnoses_encounter_id FOREIGN KEY ("encounter_id") REFERENCES encounters ("encounter_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "treatments" (
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each treatment */,
  "encounter_id" TEXT /* ID of the encounter associated with the treatment */,
  "therapy_type" TEXT /* Type of therapy (e.g., respiratory, physical) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the treatment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the treatment */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare provider who prescribed the treatment */,
  "treatment_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the treatment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the treatment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the treatment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_encounter_id FOREIGN KEY ("encounter_id") REFERENCES encounters ("encounter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_treatments_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES healthcare_providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "medications" (
  "medication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medication */,
  "treatment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the treatment associated with the medication */,
  "medication_name" TEXT /* Name of the medication */,
  "dosage" TEXT /* Dosage of the medication */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the medication */,
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* ID of the healthcare provider who prescribed the medication */,
  "prescription_date" TEXT /* Date when the medication was prescribed */,
  "refills" INTEGER /* Number of refills allowed */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the medication record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the medication record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("medication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_treatment_id FOREIGN KEY ("treatment_id") REFERENCES treatments ("treatment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_medications_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("provider_id") REFERENCES healthcare_providers ("provider_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare provider */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the healthcare provider */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the healthcare provider */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the healthcare provider */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the healthcare provider (e.g., doctor, nurse) */,
  "facility_id" TEXT /* ID of the medical facility where the provider works */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Specialty of the healthcare provider */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the provider record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the provider record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_healthcare_providers_facility_id FOREIGN KEY ("facility_id") REFERENCES facilities ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "facilities" (
  "facility_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each medical facility */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the medical facility */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the medical facility */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the medical facility */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the facility record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the facility record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("facility_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-role relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user (healthcare provider) */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-role relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user-role relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES healthcare_providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)
